title: Idle Agent Wake-Up Auto Run
description: Configurable settings (`enabled` flag + `interval_seconds`) to query the llm on a timer (e.g. every 60s) depending on the status. Idle for sure, but probably not during tasks or active chatting. Perhaps wandering if that's not related to a larger goal like finding materials, but this needs consideration. This should tie into the personality system, which really can be driven by a folder of pages in the wiki. e.g. `Data/Pages/Agents/Leo/leo.md`
